types.description: The LazyLoader can be used to prepare components that don’t need to be created immediately, such as windows that aren’t visible until triggered by another action. It works on creating the component in the gaps between frame rendering to prevent blocking the interface thread. It can also be used to preserve memory by loading components only when you need them and unloading them afterward.
